description_long: This object is a rectangular blister pack containing a grid of blue, round pills, each individually sealed in a transparent plastic dome. The pack is made from a combination of a clear plastic top and a metallic or opaque backing, typical for pharmaceutical packaging. The pills are arranged in four rows and five columns, totaling twenty units, and are evenly spaced within the pack. The plastic domes are slightly raised, giving the pack a textured, bumpy surface. There is no visible printed text or branding on the surface, and the overall appearance is clean and clinical. The object is compact and lightweight, designed for easy handling and dispensing of individual doses.
description: A rectangular blister pack with twenty blue, round pills sealed under clear plastic domes on a metallic backing. The pack is compact, clean, and designed for easy dispensing.
description_view_0: Front view shows four rows of blue pills in clear plastic domes, with the metallic backing visible around the edges.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the raised, rounded plastic domes of the pills, showing their height and arrangement in a grid.
description_view_2: Rear view mirrors the front, displaying the same grid of blue pills under clear domes, with the metallic backing visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view again emphasizes the height and uniformity of the pill domes, with the grid pattern clearly visible.
